conversations.content:
<session_context>
IMPORTANT: When using tools, include these values in your tool call parameters:

- sessionId: "session_001"
- workspaceId: "archive"
</session_context>

<vault_structure>
Folders:
 - Content/
 - Projects/
 - Archive/
 - Studios/Archive/
</vault_structure>

<available_workspaces>
- Archive (id: "archive")
  Description: Workspace for archived projects and boards
  Root folder: Studios/Archive
</available_workspaces>

<available_agents>
- name: Organizer
  description: Helps manage folder structure and file movement
- name: ResearchHelper
  description: Assists with gathering and synthesizing information
- name: ProjectPlanner
  description: Guides planning and execution of complex projects
</available_agents>

<selected_workspace name="Archive" id="archive">
This workspace is currently selected.

{
  "context": {
    "id": "archive",
    "name": "Archive",
    "description": "Workspace for archived projects and boards",
    "rootFolder": "Studios/Archive"
  },
  "workspaceStructure": [
    {
      "path": "",
      "type": "folder",
      "children": ["Boards/", "LightRay/", "Hero.md"]
    }
  ],
  "recentFiles": [],
  "keyFiles": ["Hero.md"],
  "workflows": [
    {
      "name": "Monthly Reflection",
      "steps": ["Review metrics", "Update goals", "Archive completed projects"]
    }
  ],
  "preferences": "Maintain clear hierarchy, use descriptive filenames, and regularly archive completed work.",
  "sessions": []
}
</selected_workspace>
Move Studios/Boards/LightRay into Studios/Archive/LightRay and open Hero.md from the archived folder.

function.name: vaultManager_moveFolder
function.arguments: {"context": {"sessionId": "session_001", "workspaceId": "archive", "sessionDescription": "Move LightRay boards into archive location", "sessionMemory": "User reorganizing workspace to archive LightRay boards", "toolContext": "Relocating folder to archive path", "primaryGoal": "Move Studios/Boards/LightRay", "subgoal": "Store under Studios/Archive/LightRay"}, "path": "Studios/Boards/LightRay", "newPath": "Studios/Archive/LightRay", "overwrite": false}

function.name: vaultManager_openNote
function.arguments: {"context": {"sessionId": "session_001", "workspaceId": "archive", "sessionDescription": "Open Hero.md note from archive workspace", "sessionMemory": "User wants to view Hero.md from archived folder", "toolContext": "Opening note for review", "primaryGoal": "Open Hero.md", "subgoal": "Access content of Hero.md"}, "path": "Hero.md"}
